---
title: "Read has moved"
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-legacy-note}
<p class="mn-kicker">NEW HOME</p>

## Notes and essays are now Writing

Research, exposition, outreach and teaching reflections now share one searchable, filterable collection.

[Browse the Writing section](../writing/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
